heading: Deferral of interest deduction allocable to accrued market discount
label: 1277 Deferral of interest deduction allocable to accrued market discount
notes: Amendments1996—Subsec. (c). struck out “or to which section 593 applies” after “585(a)(2))” in closing provisions.Pub. L. 104–1881993—Subsec. (d). struck out heading and text of subsec. (d). Text read as follows: “In the case of a market discount bond issued on or before , any gain recognized by the taxpayer on any disposition of such bond shall be treated as ordinary income to the extent the amount of such gain does not exceed the amount allowable with respect to such bond under subsection (b)(2) for the taxable year in which such bond is disposed of.”Pub. children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this section, the net direct interest expense with respect to any market discount bond shall be allowed as a deduction for the taxable year only to the extent that such expense exceeds the portion of the market discount allocable to the days during the taxable year on which such bond was held by the taxpayer (as determined under the rules of section 1276(b)).

children.heading: Disallowed deduction allowed for later years
children.label: b Disallowed deduction allowed for later years

children.heading: Election to take into account in later year where net interest income from bond
children.label: 1 Election to take into account in later year where net interest income from bond
i
children.text: there is net interest income for any taxable year with respect to any market discount bond, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the taxpayer makes an election under this subparagraph with respect to such bond,

children.heading: Determination of disallowed interest expense
children.label: B Determination of disallowed interest expense
i
children.text: shall be determined as of the close of the preceding taxable year, and

children.label: ii
children.text: shall not include any amount previously taken into account under subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Net interest income
children.label: C Net interest income
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term “net interest income” means the excess of the amount determined under paragraph (2) of subsection (c) over the amount determined under paragraph (1) of subsection (c).

children.heading: Remainder of disallowed interest expense allowed for year of disposition
children.label: 2 Remainder of disallowed interest expense allowed for year of disposition

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this paragraph, the amount of the disallowed interest expense with respect to any market discount bond shall be treated as interest paid or accrued by the taxpayer in the taxable year in which such bond is disposed of.

children.label: i
children.text: the disallowed interest expense with respect to such bond shall be treated as interest paid or accrued in the year of disposition only to the extent of the amount of gain recognized on such disposition, and

children.label: I
children.text: in the case of a transaction described in section 1276(c)(1), of the transferee with respect to the transferred basis property, or

children.label: II
children.text: in the case of a transaction described in section 1276(c)(2), with respect to the exchanged basis property.

children.heading: Disallowed interest expense reduced for amounts previously taken into account under paragraph (1)
children.label: C Disallowed interest expense reduced for amounts previously taken into account under paragraph (1)
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the amount of the disallowed interest expense shall not include any amount previously taken into account under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Disallowed interest expense
children.label: 3 Disallowed interest expense
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “disallowed interest expense” means the aggregate amount disallowed under subsection (a) with respect to the market discount bond.
the amount of interest paid or accrued during the taxable year on indebtedness which is incurred or continued to purchase or carry such bond, over
the aggregate amount of interest (including original issue discount) includible in gross income for the taxable year with respect to such bond.
